csharpCode: using UnityEngine; public class Script : UnityEditor.Editor { public static string Main() { try { var fsmType = typeof(FL.Gameplay.Manager.LaunchManager).Assembly.GetType("FL.Gameplay.Manager.GameFsm"); if (fsmType == null) return "GameFsm type not found"; var currentProp = fsmType.GetProperty("CurrentStateName", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Static); if (currentProp != null) return "FSM state: " + currentProp.GetValue(null); var instanceProp = fsmType.GetProperty("Instance", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Static); if (instanceProp == null) return "no Instance property"; var instance = instanceProp.GetValue(null); if (instance == null) return "FSM instance is null"; return "FSM: " + instance.ToString(); } catch (System.Exception ex) { return "Error: " + ex.Message; } } }
